title: ARTIBETTER Universal Washing Machine Knob Replacement - White Plastic Timer Selector for Washer and Dryer Accessories, 45cm
features: Universal Compatibility: This washing machine knob is designed as a universal replacement for various washer models, ensuring it fits perfectly and functions seamlessly
Compact Size: Measuring 4.5 * 4.5 * 3 cm (1.77 * 1.77 * 1.18 inches), this washing machine knob is compact and ideal for various space-saving applications
Material: Made from plastic, this washing machine knob is built to withstand regular use, offering a reliable solution for your washing needs
Sleek White Finish: The stylish white color of this washing machine knob adds a modern touch to your appliance, blending well with any washing machine design
Easy Installation: Designed for user convenience, this universal washing machine knob can be easily installed without any special tools, making it perfect for quick replacements
